message:
feat(llm): add retryLLMCall with exponential backoff per spec

Implements RetryPolicy from the unified LLM spec: retries on transient
errors (429, 500, 502, 503, network errors) with exponential backoff
and jitter. Non-retryable errors (400, 401, 403, 404, AbortError) are
thrown immediately. Supports abort signal and onRetry callback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
